channel.title: OWASP on Mahmoud - Penetration Tester | System Admin
channel.description: Recent content in OWASP on Mahmoud - Penetration Tester | System Admin

item.title: API Security Testing: Finding Vulnerabilities in Modern Web APIs
item.description: APIs are the backbone of modern applications—and a favorite target for attackers. Unlike traditional web apps, APIs often expose more functionality and data, making them high-value targets. This guide covers practical techniques for testing API security, based on the OWASP API Security Top 10. Setting Up Your Testing Environment Essential Tools # Burp Suite - HTTP interception proxy # Postman - API client for manual testing # ffuf - Fast web fuzzer # Install httpx for quick probing go install -v github.
